description_long: This is a compact electronic keyboard with a rectangular body featuring a vibrant red casing and a flat, white keybed. The keyboard has a series of black and white keys arranged in a standard piano layout, with the black keys elevated above the white keys. The casing is slightly angled, giving the keyboard a modern and streamlined appearance. The sides and back of the keyboard are solid red, while the underside appears to be black. There are no visible buttons, knobs, or branding on the surface, suggesting a minimalist design. The overall build appears lightweight and portable, suitable for casual or street performances.
description: A compact, red electronic keyboard with a white and black piano-style key layout and a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full span of black and white keys set in a red casing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled red casing and the depth of the keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid red back and the black underside, with no visible controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angled profile and the arrangement of the keys.
